summary: Testing completed for MVPLine Global Search and Bulk Selection Mode features. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working - Global Search with filters, Quick Actions, and Inbox Bulk Selection Mode with all bulk actions (archive, read, unread, delete, select all).

issues: Search icon button in inbox header doesn't have data-testid, making it harder to click programmatically - must navigate directly to /search

critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed - all search and bulk action implementations are correctly structured
Backend search router uses role-based filtering properly (get_data_filter)
Frontend correctly implements debounced search with 300ms delay
Bulk selection mode correctly disables swipe gestures on native (Platform.OS check)
All API endpoints return proper response structures
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_search_bulk_actions.py - Created comprehensive Search and Bulk Actions API tests
seed_data_creation: None required - existing seed data used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Search and Bulk Selection features fully working. Search API at /api/search/{user_id}?q=query with optional types and limit parameters. Bulk action endpoints at /api/messages/bulk/{archive|read|unread|delete}. Frontend search at /search with filter bar (All, Contacts, Conversations, Campaigns). Inbox bulk selection activated by long-press on conversation item.

global_search_backend.basic_search: PASS - Returns contacts, conversations, campaigns with correct structure
global_search_backend.contacts_filter: PASS - Types parameter filters to contacts only
global_search_backend.conversations_filter: PASS - Types parameter filters to conversations only
global_search_backend.campaigns_filter: PASS - Types parameter filters to campaigns only
global_search_backend.result_structure: PASS - Each result has id, type, title, subtitle, icon, color

bulk_actions_backend.bulk_archive: PASS - Archives multiple conversations, returns modified_count
bulk_actions_backend.bulk_delete: PASS - Deletes conversations and their messages
bulk_actions_backend.empty_ids_validation: PASS - Returns 400 for empty conversation_ids array

global_search_frontend.quick_actions: PASS - Add Contact, New Campaign, View Tasks visible when no query
global_search_frontend.search_input: PASS - Debounced search triggers API call
global_search_frontend.search_results: PASS - Results displayed with icons, colors, type badges
global_search_frontend.clear_search: PASS - X button clears search and shows Quick Actions

bulk_selection_frontend.long_press_activation: PASS - Long press (500ms) enters selection mode
bulk_selection_frontend.selection_header: PASS - Shows X (cancel), count, Select All button
bulk_selection_frontend.checkbox_ui: PASS - Circular checkboxes appear next to each conversation
bulk_selection_frontend.bulk_action_bar: PASS - Archive, Read, Unread, Delete buttons visible
bulk_selection_frontend.archive_action: PASS - Archives selected and exits selection mode
bulk_selection_frontend.cancel_selection: PASS - X button exits selection mode

design_observations.search_page: Clean dark theme, proper contrast, filter chips have count badges
design_observations.bulk_selection: iOS-style circular checkboxes, bottom action bar well spaced
design_observations.accessibility: data-testid attributes present on key elements
